## [00:00 - 02:59]

This is a pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer. Let's go. I believe really strongly in the Facebook ads funnel. And I think I approach Facebook ads differently than a lot of people do. But I see it, I see that it works. Okay, so I know a lot of people, a lot of advertisers look at a strategy of, okay, we just need to get sales. So everything we're going to do is going to try to get sales. Everything's optimizing for conversions, optimizing for purchases. And look, I get it. If you're an e-com that you don't have a whole lot of options. But for a lot of us, it makes sense to have this as a tiered approach. Because what I have seen is not everybody is ready to buy right now. I need, since I'm also built around traffic and my email list, I need to build trust and build some expertise to help you understand that I know what I'm talking about before I try to convince you into buying something from me. So it starts at the top. I want to drive traffic to my website or build some trust and expertise in some other way it could be with video or something else at the very top. That's number one. Number two, I need to build my email list. And oftentimes I'm building my email list out of people who were out of group number one. And number three, now I'm going to sell something. And so usually I'm going to sell something to people who have already been exposed to me. Because I want someone who is more, most likely to actually be happy with what they bought, not have any remorse, any regret. I don't want to have to deal with refunds and things like that because they didn't know what they're getting into. I want to sell to people who know who I am, who have been exposed to my stuff before, who know my style, know it's a fit. I mean you can even go a step further and go to the fourth step of selling to people who have abandoned shopping cart and stuff like that. That's kind of a part of the third. But regardless here, we're talking about a funnel where I'm going to spend the most amount of money just driving people to my website, maybe watch videos, the second most to build my email list and really the least amount of money to the sale. But that's where I find I'm most efficient and it works really, really well. So that's how I use the Facebook ads funnel. This has been a pubcast shot. Guess what?
